title: Metasploit Framework
description: The world's most widely used penetration testing framework — exploit development, delivery, and post-exploitation.
fullExplanation: Metasploit is an open-source penetration testing framework that provides a complete environment for developing, testing, and executing exploits. It contains 2,000+ exploits, 1,000+ payloads, and hundreds of auxiliary modules. The msfconsole is the primary interface. Metasploit Pro adds automation and reporting for enterprise use. Originally created by HD Moore in 2003, acquired by Rapid7 in 2009.

components.name: msfconsole
components.description: Primary command-line interface — search, configure, and launch exploits

components.name: Exploits
components.description: 2,000+ modules targeting specific CVEs in software and services

components.name: Payloads
components.description: Code executed after exploitation — Meterpreter, shell, staged/stageless

components.name: Meterpreter
components.description: Advanced in-memory payload — file system, network, pivoting, keylogging

components.name: Auxiliary
components.description: Scanners, fuzzers, sniffers, brute-forcers — no exploitation

components.name: Post
components.description: Post-exploitation modules — privilege escalation, persistence, pivoting

components.name: Encoders
components.description: Obfuscate payloads to evade AV detection

keyFacts: Meterpreter runs entirely in memory — no files written to disk
msfvenom generates standalone payloads in 40+ formats
Metasploit Pro adds automated exploitation and reporting
Always get written authorization before using Metasploit
EternalBlue module: ms17_010_eternalblue — most used exploit
